title: Add information-only option to forms
excerpt: There are instances where I want to add more information to a section in the form but every option is an input for the end-user. Please add an information-only option, like a description that we can use at-will as creato…

posts.author: SEO_Ops (E.SEO)
posts.cookedHtml: There are instances where I want to add more information to a section in the form but every option is an input for the end-user. Please add an information-only option, like a description that we can use at-will as creators on forms.

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

You could look into using the description area for each question
I know this this is not the answer you were looking but hopefully it provides some sort of workaround in the interim.

Hope this helps!

Cheers,
Harsh

We empower businesses to unlock Monday’s full potential, driving growth and operational excellence.

posts.author: victorblake (Victor Blake)
posts.cookedHtml:
Add information-only option to forms Feature requests
Hi, You could look into using the description area for each question I know this this is not the answer you were looking but hopefully it provides some sort of workaround in the interim. posts.author: SEO_Ops (E.SEO)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello Fario, thank you for this information. I am aware of the description below the titles on form inputs, I’m looking for more than that. A description that is not tied to an input, that exists on its own and purely for communication of information for the person filling out the form (or for internal employees about the form).
